metadata.description: Location for all resources.
Name for your AI Services resource.
The name of the model you want to deploy
The provider of your model
The version of your model
The sku of your model deployment
The tokens per minute (TPM) of your model deployment

projectDescription.defaultValue: A project for the AI Foundry account with network secured deployed Agent

metadata.description: This project will be a sub-resource of your account
The display name of the project
Virtual Network name for the Agent to create new or existing virtual network
The name of Agents Subnet to create new or existing subnet for agents
The name of Private Endpoint subnet to create new or existing subnet for private endpoints
The name of MCP subnet for user-deployed Container Apps (e.g., MCP servers)
Existing Virtual Network name Resource ID
Address space for the VNet (only used for new VNet)
Address prefix for the agent subnet. The default value is 192.168.0.0/24 but you can choose any size /26 or any class like 10.0.0.0 or 172.168.0.0
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet
Address prefix for the MCP subnet. The default value is 192.168.2.0/24.
The name of the APIM subnet for outbound VNet integration (only used when deployApiManagement is true)
Address prefix for the APIM subnet. The default value is 192.168.3.0/24.
The AI Search Service full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.
The AI Storage Account full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.
The Cosmos DB Account full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field, and if not provided, the resource will be created.
The Microsoft Fabric Workspace full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field for Fabric private link connectivity.
The API Management Service full ARM Resource ID. This is an optional field for existing API Management services.
Set to true to deploy an API Management service. If apiManagementResourceId is also provided, the existing resource will be used instead.
The SKU of the API Management service. Only StandardV2 and PremiumV2 support private endpoints.
The capacity (scale units) of the API Management service
Publisher email for the API Management service (required when deployApiManagement is true)
Publisher name for the API Management service (required when deployApiManagement is true)
Name for the APIM gateway connection on the project
API version for inference calls through APIM (chat completions)
Static model deployments to expose through the APIM gateway. Each item needs name, properties.model.name, properties.model.version, properties.model.format.
Set to true to deploy Application Insights for agent tracing and logging.
Set to true to deploy Azure Bastion and a jump box VM for portal access to private resources.
Address prefix for AzureBastionSubnet (minimum /26)
Admin password for the jump box VM (required when deployBastion is true)
Set to true to deploy an Azure OpenAI resource in a different region and connect it to the Foundry account.
Azure region for the cross-region Azure OpenAI resource
Model name to deploy in the cross-region OpenAI resource
Model version for the cross-region deployment
Object mapping DNS zone names to their resource group, or empty string to indicate creation
Zone Names for Validation of existing Private Dns Zones
The name of the project capability host to be created
Azure region for the deployment
The name of the virtual network
Indicates if an existing VNet should be used
Subscription ID of the existing VNet (if different from current subscription)
Resource Group name of the existing VNet (if different from current resource group)

The name of Private Endpoint subnet
The name of MCP subnet for user-deployed Container Apps

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 0)), createObject('value', parameters('agentSubnetPrefix')))]

metadata.description: Name of the virtual network
Name of the subnet
Address prefix for the subnet
Array of subnet delegations

subnetId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), '/')[1])]

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('peSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 1)), createObject('value', parameters('peSubnetPrefix')))]

parameters.addressPrefix: [if(empty(parameters('mcpSubnetPrefix')), createObject('value', cidrSubnet(reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '2024-05-01').addressSpace.addressPrefixes[0], 24, 2)), createObject('value', parameters('mcpSubnetPrefix')))]

parameters.apimSubnetId: [if(parameters('deployApiManagement'), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('vnetResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('apim-subnet-{0}-deployment', variables('uniqueSuffix'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.subnetId.value), createObject('value', ''))]

variables.conditionStr: [format('((!(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/tags/read''}})  AND  !(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/filter/action''}}) AND  !(ActionMatches{{''Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/blobs/tags/write''}}) ) OR (@Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:name] StringStartsWithIgnoreCase ''{0}'' AND @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:name] StringLikeIgnoreCase ''*-azureml-agent''))', parameters('workspaceId'))]
